hooks.command: bash -c 'jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" | grep -qE "/(src|migrations)/|/Cargo\.toml$" && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"REMINDER: You just edited code/migrations. Before ending the turn, update the relevant note(s) in knowledge/wiki/ to reflect this change. See CLAUDE.md > Wiki sync.\"}}" || true'
